title: crotalaria tiantaiensis
intro: Crotalaria tiantaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Crotalaria tiantaiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in capsule or tablet form.
